features.title: An Unfair Advantage for Your Career
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to automate your job search

scraping.title: New Jobs Before Everyone Else
scraping.description: We monitor career pages of your target companies 6x per day. Smart scraping with 3 different strategies — no job slips through.

alerts.title: Alerts That Cut the Noise
alerts.description: Set keywords that match your profile. Only get jobs that make sense for you, straight to your inbox — no spam.

ai.title: AI That Rewrites Your Resume
ai.description: Compatibility score, missing ATS keywords, and suggestions with ready-to-paste text. Not generic advice — your resume tailored for each job.

monitoring.title: Track Your Applications
monitoring.description: Visual Kanban to organize the entire process: from application to offer. Know exactly where each opportunity stands.

step1.title: 1. Choose Your Companies
step1.description: Select the companies where you dream of working.

step2.title: 2. Set Your Filters
step2.description: Specify the roles and keywords that match your profile.

step3.title: 3. Receive & Optimize
step3.description: New jobs land in your inbox. Click to see the AI analysis and apply suggestions directly to your resume.

problem.headline: The reality of job hunting today
problem.pain1: of resumes are discarded by bots before a human ever sees them
problem.pain2: lost per week searching for jobs manually across dozens of sites
problem.pain3: of ideal jobs are filled before you even find out about them

testimonials.headline: Getting there first
testimonials.sub: Candidates who used ScrapJobs to beat the competition. Here's what they're saying.

items.name: Mariana Silva
items.body1: I used to open 6 career pages every day and forget half of them. Now it lands in my inbox and I pick what to reply to.
items.body2Bold: Already in process at two companies.

items.name: Rafael Costa
items.body1: Applied to a role the day it went live — found out by email. Before I'd only hear about it when there were already a thousand applicants.

items.name: Camila Oliveira
items.body1: Job sites dump everything together and the filter is awful. Here I pick the companies I actually care about.
items.body2Bold: Fewer jobs reach me, but all of them make sense.

items.name: Lucas Ferreira
items.body1: I kept sending resumes to jobs that had 500 applicants and never heard back. I started applying only to the ones ScrapJobs flagged as freshly posted.
items.body2Bold: That's how one of them finally worked.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

security.question: Is my resume data secure?
security.answer: Yes, we use end-to-end encryption and follow security best practices. Your data is never shared with third parties and you have full control over your information.

ai.question: How does the AI analysis work?
ai.answer: Our AI compares the job's keywords and requirements with your resume's skills and experiences, generating a compatibility score and personalized suggestions to improve your chances.

cancel.question: Can I cancel at any time?
cancel.answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time, no hassle. There are no cancellation fees or grace periods.

limits.question: How many companies can I monitor?
limits.answer: It depends on your plan! The Basic plan allows up to 3 sites, Professional up to 8, and Premium up to 30 sites.

faq.ctaDescription: Leave manual job searching in the past. Focus your energy on what really matters: preparing for interviews and landing your dream job.

productVisualization.title: AI Analysis Straight to Your Inbox
productVisualization.description: Get a detailed compatibility analysis between your resume and each job, with score, strengths, and improvement suggestions.
productVisualization.bullet1: Compatibility score: know in seconds if the job is right for you
productVisualization.bullet2: Strengths and gaps: understand exactly where you fit
productVisualization.bullet3: Resume suggestions: tailor your CV for each job automatically
productVisualization.emailAlt: ScrapJobs analysis email with 85/100 compatibility score

stats.trustLine: Real data from our platform, updated in real time

radar.headline: Jobs straight from the source.
radar.body1: While everyone fights over recycled listings on LinkedIn, ScrapJobs monitors the career sites of the companies you chose directly. No middlemen. No third-party filters.
radar.body2: The job appeared on Nubank's site at 9am.
radar.body2End: Those relying on Gupy won't see it until tomorrow.
radar.sourceBadge: Straight from the official company site — no middlemen
radar.mockDisclaimer: Illustrative examples. Trademarks belong to their owners.

ats.scoreSummary: The candidate demonstrates strong backend experience with Java and Spring Boot, but lacks details in payments and technical leadership.
ats.strength1Title: Experience with microservices using Java and Spring Boot
ats.strength1Desc: Foundation for the job's architecture, including scalable distributed systems.
ats.strength2Title: Hands-on knowledge of Kubernetes and CI/CD
ats.strength2Desc: Important for high availability and secure deployment pipelines.
ats.gap1Title: Missing experience with payment systems and authorization.
ats.gap1Desc: Payment cycles and fintech are critical for this role.
ats.gap2Title: No evidence of technical leadership and mentoring.
ats.gap2Desc: Fundamental requirement for the senior position.
ats.suggestion1Text: Include payment and technical leadership keywords.
ats.suggestion1Example: Software Developer focused on backend and cloud environments, with experience in Java Spring Boot microservices...
ats.finalText: Focus on aligning your experience with payment and fintech keywords, and highlighting technical leadership.
ats.headline: Find out why you're
ats.body1: Upload your current resume. In seconds, our AI cross-references your profile with the job and delivers a complete diagnosis: ATS score, missing keywords, and gaps that are sabotaging your applications.
ats.body2Bold: Now you know exactly what to fix.

pdf.headline: A perfect resume
pdf.body1: The AI takes the gaps, suggests the right keywords, and rebuilds your sentences to pass the ATS filter. You choose what to apply and download the PDF — ready to send.
pdf.body2Bold: One click between you and the perfect application.
pdf.emailHint: Or send the full analysis by email

howItWorksNew.headline: From zero to perfect application.
howItWorksNew.step1Description: Upload your PDF. Your data is filled in automatically.
howItWorksNew.step2Description: As soon as a job is posted at the companies you monitor, you're notified.
howItWorksNew.step3Description: ATS score, missing keywords and gaps — all analyzed in seconds.
howItWorksNew.step4Description: Download the optimized CV for the job and apply before everyone else.
